EmailTemplate.name: D1 Term Loan Payment Reminder
EmailTemplate.subject: Affirm Financial Term Loan Payment Reminder
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear {!Product__c.First_Name__c},
We know you take your credit seriously, so we are sending you this email as a reminder that payment on your Affirm Term Loan is past due. We suspect this payment has been overlooked, please contact Affirm to rectify your past due payment today. If you’ve already made arrangements for payment of this account, please disregard this email.
The amount required to bring your account into good standing is {!Product__c.Past_Due_Amount__c}.
Choose one of our convenient payment options listed below:
Set up a onetime bill payment through your online banking if you bank with BMO, TD, BNS, Credit Unions or Tangerine. Just add Payee: "Affirm Financial". Account number {!LPAD(Product__c.Name, 8, '0')}. Or pay directly at your local bank. Contact Affirm Financial to set up a new Pre Authorized withdrawl against your account provided. Mail a cheque to: Affirm Financial Services, PO Box 53, Station B, London, Ontario, N6A 4V3
Making consistent on time minimum payments is very important to your credit score. A past due payment will have a negative impact on your credit rating and your ability to obtain future credit.
To discuss payment arrangements, please contact us at 1-855-266-3131. Hours of operation are as follows:
Monday-Thursday 8:00 AM-7:00 PM EST Friday 8:00 AM-6:00 PM EST Saturday 9:00 AM-5:00 PM EST
Sincerely,
Affirm Financial Services 1-855-266-3131
Please note that payments made using non-guaranteed funds may take up to 7 days for the payment to clear.
